name: Beginner's Method (LBL)
description: The layer-by-layer method most people learn first. Solves the cube one layer at a time with a small set of easy-to-memorize algorithms.

steps.name: White Cross
steps.description: Form a plus sign on the white face, ensuring edge pieces match adjacent center colors.
tips: Daisy method: make a yellow cross first, then flip edges down
Match edge colors to centers

steps.name: White Corners
steps.description: Insert the 4 white corner pieces to complete the first layer.
tips: Use R U R' U' trigger repeatedly
Position corner above its slot
Repeat up to 5 times per corner

steps.name: Second Layer Edges
steps.description: Insert the 4 middle layer edge pieces using two mirror algorithms.
tips: Only 2 algorithms needed (left and right insert)
Find edges in top layer
If edge is flipped, insert wrong then redo

steps.name: Yellow Cross
steps.description: Form a yellow cross on the top face (orientation only).
tips: F R U R' U' F' is the key algorithm
May need to repeat 1-3 times
Dot → L → Line → Cross

steps.name: Yellow Face
steps.description: Orient all yellow corners so the entire top face is yellow.
tips: R U R' U R U2 R' is the key algorithm
Apply to each unoriented corner
Don't panic if cube looks scrambled mid-algorithm

steps.name: Position Yellow Corners
steps.description: Move yellow corners to their correct positions (ignoring orientation which is already done).
tips: Look for a corner that's already correct
U R U' L' U R' U' L cycle
May need to repeat

steps.name: Position Yellow Edges
steps.description: Cycle the last layer edges into their correct positions to complete the solve.
tips: Find one solved edge and position it at back
R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2 cycle
Clockwise or counterclockwise

creator: David Singmaster
